_guide: 슬롯 결과 이미지 프롬프트. 핵심: 씬이 가득 차야 하고, 캐릭터는 동적이어야 한다. 정적 포즈 금지.
scene_composition: dynamic angle, dynamic pose, action shot, detailed background, full scene, centered composition, vibrant, lively atmosphere, depth of field, cinematic composition

result_expressions.critical_success: sparkling eyes, overjoyed, triumphant, fist pump, sparkle effects, dramatic lighting, glowing aura, motion blur, wind blowing hair
result_expressions.success: bright smile, happy, enjoying, expressive, warm lighting, soft glow, cheerful atmosphere
result_expressions.normal: focused, concentrated, active, engaged, natural lighting
result_expressions.failure: surprised, comedic reaction, sweat drop, chibi expression, exaggerated shock, dust cloud, comedic impact lines

study.scene: classroom interior, wooden desks, tall windows with sunlight streaming in, bookshelves lining walls, chalkboard with equations, scattered papers, ink bottles, globe on shelf

variants.private_school: cozy small classroom, warm afternoon sunlight through window, stacks of books on desk, quill in hand writing eagerly, ink splatter on fingers, leaning forward over notebook, classmates in background
variants.royal_academy: grand ornate lecture hall, massive chandeliers, marble columns, golden light, mahogany desks, thick leather-bound textbooks, raising hand excitedly among well-dressed students, stained glass windows
variants.magic_school: mystical tower classroom, floating glowing books orbiting around, magic circles on floor, crystal orbs on shelves, pointing wand at swirling spell, rune-covered desk, starry ceiling enchantment, ethereal purple light

study.success_scene: proudly holding up perfect test paper, surrounded by floating A+ grades, classmates looking impressed
study.failure_scene: face down on desk sleeping, drooling on textbook, ink smudge on cheek, papers scattered everywhere, comedic snot bubble

martial.scene: traditional wooden dojo, tatami mats, weapon racks on walls, hanging scrolls, sunlight through paper screens

variants.martial_dojo: mid-kick action shot, leg extended high, training dummy flying backward from impact, dust rising from tatami, white gi with belt fluttering, intense focused expression, sweat droplets in air, other students watching amazed
variants.sword_dojo: mid-sword swing with wooden bokken, dynamic slash motion lines, hair whipping with movement, feet planted in wide stance, wooden splinters flying from struck target, dramatic side lighting, determined eyes
variants.knight_training: outdoor training ground, swinging heavy practice sword overhead, metal armor glinting in sunlight, dirt kicking up from boots, training dummies and obstacles around, castle walls in background, banner fluttering in wind, other knights training

martial.success_scene: victorious pose standing over broken training dummy, fist raised, sunburst behind, impact crater in ground
martial.failure_scene: tangled in own weapon, fallen on butt, legs up comically, seeing stars, wooden sword flying away, embarrassed blush

arts.scene: bright art studio, paint-splattered floor, canvases everywhere, natural light from skylight

variants.art_class: painting on large easel with bold brush strokes, paint palette in other hand overflowing with colors, paint splattered on cheek and apron, colorful abstract painting taking shape, brushes and tubes scattered on table, afternoon light through tall studio windows, other easels with paintings in background
variants.music_class: playing violin passionately with eyes closed, bow mid-stroke across strings, music notes visually floating and swirling around, hair and skirt flowing with movement, spotlight on performer, grand music room with piano and instruments on walls, sheet music scattered on stand
variants.dance_class: mid-pirouette with one leg extended, ballet shoes, tutu fluttering, arms gracefully raised, reflected in wall-length mirror, polished hardwood floor, ballet barre, spotlights creating dramatic shadows, rose petals floating in air

arts.success_scene: holding up gorgeous finished painting to viewer, surrounded by floating art supplies, gallery-worthy masterpiece, confetti of paint drops
arts.failure_scene: accidentally splashed paint everywhere, covered head to toe in rainbow paint, canvas ruined with handprint, cat walked through wet painting, comedic chaos

etiquette.scene: elegant aristocratic parlor, ornate furniture, crystal chandelier, fine china tea set, draped curtains

variants.etiquette_school: performing perfect curtsy in elegant room, holding teacup with extended pinky, perfectly set table with tiered cake stand, flower arrangements, afternoon tea steam rising, lace tablecloth, well-dressed instructor watching approvingly, sunlight through lace curtains
variants.royal_protocol: grand throne room, red carpet leading to golden throne, practicing formal bow before royal audience, magnificent crystal chandeliers above, tapestries on walls, guards in formation, crown princess dress with train, marble pillars and arched ceiling, rose petals on floor

etiquette.success_scene: perfectly poised curtsy, audience of nobles applauding, showered in rose petals, radiant smile, golden spotlight
etiquette.failure_scene: tripping on long dress hem, teacup flying from hand, cake falling off plate, scandalized noble gasping, tumbling into table comedically

faith.scene: grand cathedral interior, stained glass windows casting colorful light, stone arches, candelabras, incense smoke

variants.theology: kneeling at altar reading thick scripture book, golden candlelight illuminating face, rays of colorful light from massive stained glass window behind, stone pillars, choir benches, incense smoke wisping, peaceful devoted expression, holy book glowing softly
variants.temple_training: meditating in serene temple garden, sitting cross-legged on stone, gentle golden aura emanating from body, cherry blossom petals falling around, koi pond reflecting light, bamboo and bonsai trees, incense trail, zen garden patterns in sand, transcendent peaceful expression

faith.success_scene: hands clasped in prayer with brilliant divine light descending, angel feathers falling, holy circles appearing, transcendent joy
faith.failure_scene: nodding off during prayer, head bobbing, candle wax dripping on scripture, startled awake by temple bell, comedic guilty expression

cooking.scene: warm busy kitchen, copper pots hanging, stone oven fire glowing, ingredients spread across wooden counter

variants.cooking_basic: energetically stirring large pot with wooden spoon, steam billowing up, apron covered in flour, chef hat slightly tilted, vegetables and ingredients scattered across rustic wooden counter, fire crackling in stone hearth, hanging herbs and garlic, warm orange kitchen lighting, tasting with anticipation
variants.cooking_advanced: carefully decorating elaborate multi-tier cake with piping bag, professional kitchen with gleaming steel, beautiful plated dishes on counter, intricate sugar flowers, concentrated tongue sticking out, pastry tools everywhere, flour dust floating in beam of light, masterful precision

cooking.success_scene: proudly presenting gorgeous plated dish with steam rising, sparkle effects around food, diners drooling in background, chef kiss pose
cooking.failure_scene: kitchen disaster, pot boiling over with black smoke, fire extinguisher in hand, charred unrecognizable food, soot on face, fire alarm going off, comedic explosion aftermath

magic.scene: mystical wizard tower room, arcane circles, floating crystals, shelves of potions and scrolls

variants.magic_school: casting spell with both hands outstretched, massive glowing magic circle on floor rotating beneath feet, energy bolts and particles swirling around body, wizard robe billowing from magical wind, floating spell books open around, crystal orbs glowing on shelves, rune-covered stone walls, dramatic upward camera angle, hair floating from magic energy

magic.success_scene: perfect spell creating beautiful light phoenix or dragon, amazed classmates backing away, pure brilliant magical energy, triumphant
magic.failure_scene: spell backfire explosion, covered in soot, hair standing straight up and smoking, wild sparks flying everywhere, frog sitting on head, potion bottles shattered, comedic mushroom cloud

variants.job_farm: swinging pitchfork loading hay onto cart, straw hat flying off from effort, overalls rolled up, sun-drenched golden wheat field stretching to horizon, red barn in background, chickens scattering at feet, sweat glistening, blue sky with fluffy clouds, dynamic swinging motion

variants.job_ranch: hugging baby lamb, surrounded by fluffy animals, baby chick on head, puppy at feet, pastoral green hills, white picket fence, wooden stable, morning golden hour light, flowers in meadow, heartwarming scene, animals crowding around affectionately
variants.job_church: sweeping church courtyard with oversized broom, autumn leaves swirling in wind, stone church with bell tower behind, stained glass glinting, peaceful morning light, birds perching on broom handle, gentle warm atmosphere
variants.job_gravekeeper: holding lantern up in misty graveyard at twilight, fog rolling between tombstones, spooky blue moonlight, one hand clutching broom nervously, bat flying past, jack-o-lanterns on graves, gothic iron fence, scared but brave expression, dramatic shadows

variants.job_hunter: crouched behind bush tracking deer in dense forest, holding bow ready to draw, dappled sunlight through canopy, forest floor covered in leaves, mushrooms and ferns, alert focused expression, ranger leather outfit, quiver on back, morning mist between trees
variants.job_errand_quarter: running through narrow lantern-lit alley at night, carrying wrapped package, red paper lanterns hanging overhead, entertainment district atmosphere, colorful signs and banners, geisha and courtesans visible in doorways, curious wide-eyed expression, dodging between adults, small messenger bag, cobblestone street, warm glowing windows, mysterious nightlife atmosphere
variants.job_bathhouse: scrubbing large wooden bath in steamy bathhouse, towel wrapped around body, wet hair clinging to face, lantern-lit stone interior, steam clouds rising, wooden buckets and soap, hot spring atmosphere, flushed cheeks from heat, other bathers partially visible through steam, bamboo partition, carrying stack of fresh towels
variants.job_tavern_night: serving drinks in dimly lit nighttime tavern, revealing barmaid outfit with low neckline, rowdy patrons at wooden tables, candlelight and fireplace glow, tankards of ale, carrying tray above head through crowd, smoky atmosphere, dart board and card games in background, lively dangerous atmosphere
variants.job_entertainment: pouring wine for seated patron in ornate entertainment hall, silk dress with high slit, dim red lantern lighting, cushioned floor seating, folding screen with painted art, shamisen and instruments on stand, sake bottles, elegant geisha-inspired interior, coy smile, kneeling gracefully
variants.job_noble_attendant: adjusting noble lord's collar while standing close, elegant maid uniform with frills, ornate private chamber, four-poster bed in background, wine glasses on side table, candlelight casting warm shadows, nervous blush, intimate distance, luxurious fabrics and curtains
variants.job_massage: kneeling beside massage table pressing hands on client back, thin robe loosely worn, oil bottles on shelf, incense smoke curling, warm amber lighting, bamboo mat floor, relaxation room with curtains, concentrated expression, sleeves rolled up, herbal pouches hanging
variants.job_dancer: mid-dance with flowing sheer fabric veil, belly dancer outfit with coin belt, spotlight on stage, audience silhouettes below, hip movement with fabric trailing, jeweled accessories, dramatic theatrical lighting, flower petals thrown from audience, confident seductive expression, bare midriff
variants.job_pleasure_house: sweeping entrance hall of ornate pleasure house, simple servant outfit, red silk curtains and paper lanterns, waiting courtesans in background in elaborate kimono, incense burner on reception desk, night scene through open door, forbidden luxurious atmosphere, curious wide eyes looking around
variants.job_patron_companion: walking arm-in-arm with well-dressed older nobleman through moonlit garden, elegant evening dress with jewelry, fountain and rose garden, night sky with stars, holding fan, sophisticated atmosphere, grand mansion in background, attendants following at distance, blushing with practiced smile
variants.job_potion_brewing: dimly lit alchemy workshop, bubbling cauldrons and glass vials with colorful liquids, dried herbs hanging from ceiling, mortar and pestle grinding ingredients, mysterious recipes on parchment, steam rising from potion, concentrated expression mixing ingredients, stained apron, candlelit atmosphere, shelves of bottles and jars
variants.job_secret_model: private artist studio, large canvas on easel, painter working in background, dramatic pose on velvet chaise lounge, flowing sheer fabric draped artistically, warm golden lamplight, scattered paint tubes and brushes, nervous but determined expression, curtained windows for privacy, artistic atmosphere
variants.rope_art_class: dimly lit workshop with wooden beams, intricate rope patterns displayed on wall, hemp rope coils on floor, practicing decorative knots on wooden mannequin, traditional Japanese shibari reference art on scroll, warm candlelight, focused expression tying elaborate knot pattern, silk cushions, incense smoke curling, elegant yet forbidden atmosphere
variants.secret_salon: luxurious underground parlor with velvet curtains, crystal chandelier, masked aristocrats lounging on divans, wine glasses and exotic fruits, dim golden lighting, sheer curtain partitions, whispered conversations, elegant dress slightly disheveled, wide curious eyes observing decadent scene, rose petals scattered
variants.underground_arena: torchlit stone arena below ground, circular fighting pit with sand floor, rowdy crowd behind iron fence cheering, bloodstains on arena wall, fist raised in fighting stance, torn training clothes, sweat flying, dramatic low angle, fierce determined expression, betting slips flying in air
variants.masquerade_attendant: grand ballroom with ornate masks everywhere, carrying silver tray among dancing couples, elaborate costume with feathered mask pushed up, mysterious figures in shadows, enormous crystal chandelier, marble pillars draped in dark velvet, couples in suggestive embraces behind pillars, nervous blush beneath mask

variants.dungeon_guide: stone corridor with iron doors and torch sconces, holding ring of ornate keys and leather-bound guidebook, wall display of various restraints and implements, explaining safety protocols to hooded client, professional demeanor with slight blush, candlelit dungeon atmosphere, red velvet curtain at end of hall

job.failure_scene: spectacular mess, dropped everything, plates shattering, animals escaped, panicking while trying to catch loose chicken, slipping on spilled liquid

event_scenes.dark_encounter: dimly lit back alley at night, mysterious figure approaching, red lantern light spilling from doorway, shadowy atmosphere, cobblestone wet from rain, steam rising from grate, nervous expression, clutching cloak

standing_portrait._guide: 스탠딩 포트레이트. stance + 의상 + 나이를 반영한 캐릭터 전신 이미지. stance/나이/의상 변경 시 재생성.
standing_portrait.base_scene: standing, looking at viewer, simple clean background, soft gradient background, full body
